Project Details

AI PEPE TRADER

A sustainable investment platform based on Binance network (BSC) blockchain smart-contract technology.  

PLANS :

≈ Plan 1: 20.00% 200 days 400% Return

≈ Plan 2: 30.50% 150 days 225% Return

≈ Plan 3: 35.50% 90 days 135% Return

❗️Withdrawals are subject to 3% Sustainability tax which will stay in the contract.

❗️When withdrawn and re-invested this will make a new plan but increase daily rewards

❗️You Can Make As Many New Deposits Into Different Plans As You Like Upto 150 BNB Max Per Wallet

 
REQUIREMENTS :

≈ Plan 1: min. 0.01 BNB, max. of 50 BNB

≈ Plan 2: min. 0.2 BNB, max. of 45 BNB

≈ Plan 3: min. 0.2 BNB, max. of 40 BNB

 
REFERRAL SYSTEM :

≈ 1 level referral bonus of 2%

 
ANTI-WHALE CONTROL FEATURES :

≈ 168 hours cut off time

≈ 120 hours withdraw cooldown

≈ Max active deposit limit of 50 BNB Per Plan

 
CONTRACT FEATURES :

≈ Plan rewards

≈ Fees Used For rehypothecation

≈ Project Statistics


Note: Funds that are used to initially deposit(re-invested) cannot be withdrawn. Please use the application at your own risk.
